series_metadata.series_description: To document all training activities and certification records of the Division-owned canines including initial training records, on-going training records, and certifications.(HP-40A)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan all paper documents into OTIS and destroy ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) years after the canine is no longer in service with the Division then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
